description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage. Add a deploy_aws_s3 job that runs in the deploy stage using the napp/docker-aws-cli Docker image and only executes on the master branch. The job runs the exact commands: aws s3 cp ./tableau-style s3://$AWS_BUCKET/$AWS_FOLDER/tableau-style --recursive --acl public-read; aws s3 cp . s3://$AWS_BUCKET/$AWS_FOLDER --recursive --exclude "*" --include "*.css" --include "*.js" --include "*.html" --acl public-read; aws configure set preview.cloudfront true; aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $CDN_DISTRIBUTION_ID --paths "/brushfilter/*". It uploads static files to an S3 bucket and triggers a CloudFront invalidation.
